designLineage.primaryInspiration: Marine biology research station control panels — dual-monitor instrument setups where each screen independently displays different data feeds from tank monitoring systems
designLineage.secondaryInspiration: Laboratory SCADA interfaces — industrial process monitoring with resizable pane layouts, real-time data feeds, and muted alarm indicators
designLineage.tertiaryInspiration: Aquarium observation decks — the feeling of looking through thick glass at fluid systems, with hard structural frames (steel, concrete) surrounding organic content (water, life)

differentiationFromOtherPasses.vsPass1: Pass 1 used blob morphing and organic shapes. Pass 8 uses hard rectangular split panes with rigid engineering geometry. No organic shapes anywhere.
differentiationFromOtherPasses.vsPass2: Pass 2 used wave current streaming and horizontal flow layouts. Pass 8 uses static split panes with vertical dividers and independent scroll regions.
differentiationFromOtherPasses.vsPass3: Pass 3 used mercury droplet metallic effects. Pass 8 uses flat matte surfaces with minimal gradients, no metallic sheen.
differentiationFromOtherPasses.vsPass4: Pass 4 used aurora plasma ribbons. Pass 8 has no gradient ribbons or aurora effects — only subtle pulsing divider lines.
differentiationFromOtherPasses.vsPass5: Pass 5 used deep ocean bioluminescence as a theme. Pass 8 uses aquarium monitoring as a metaphor — the bioluminescence is limited to accent colors on borders, not ambient lighting.
differentiationFromOtherPasses.vsPass6: Pass 6 used lava lamp psychedelic cycling. Pass 8 is strictly monochromatic teal with controlled pink accent, no cycling or color animation.
differentiationFromOtherPasses.vsPass7: Pass 7 used editorial ink flow with cinematic fades. Pass 8 uses rapid loading-wave transitions and staggered element reveals, no editorial columns or cinematic approach.

structuralUniqueness.navApproach: Horizontal toolbar with icon+label buttons — no sidebar, no hamburger overlay, no bottom tab bar, no floating nav. This is a thin utilitarian toolbar reminiscent of engineering software.
structuralUniqueness.contentLayout: Resizable split-pane layout with draggable dividers — unlike grid, bento, column, card-grid, or single-scroll approaches used in other passes.
structuralUniqueness.scrollBehavior: Independent scroll regions per pane — left and right panes scroll independently. No page-level scrolling at all.
structuralUniqueness.dividerDesign: Animated vertical divider lines that pulse with accent color gradient — a unique structural element not present in any other pass.
structuralUniqueness.mobileAdaptation: Panes stack vertically with horizontal dividers — maintains the split-pane mental model even on mobile, just reoriented.

visualLanguageUniqueness.colorApplication: Deep teal monochrome with bioluminescent cyan accents on interactive elements only. Pink accent used sparingly for secondary status indicators.
visualLanguageUniqueness.surfaceTreatment: Flat matte panels with subtle elevation via 1px borders only — no shadows, no gradients on surfaces, no frosted glass.
visualLanguageUniqueness.motionPhilosophy: Resize-drag as primary motion language — the act of resizing panes is the central interactive metaphor. Secondary motion is staggered reveal (elements surfacing from depth).
visualLanguageUniqueness.typographicApproach: Technical/engineering typography (Exo 2) paired with utilitarian body text (Work Sans). Heavy use of monospace (JetBrains Mono) for data display.

antiRepeatVerification.blobMorph: NOT USED — all shapes are rectangular with small border-radius
antiRepeatVerification.waveStream: NOT USED — no horizontal wave or stream animations
antiRepeatVerification.mercuryDroplet: NOT USED — no metallic or chrome effects
antiRepeatVerification.auroraPlasma: NOT USED — no gradient ribbons or plasma effects
antiRepeatVerification.deepOceanBioluminescence: NOT USED — aquarium theme is about monitoring/control, not underwater immersion
antiRepeatVerification.lavaLamp: NOT USED — no color cycling or psychedelic effects
antiRepeatVerification.editorialInkFlow: NOT USED — no editorial columns or ink-based transitions
antiRepeatVerification.hamburgerMenu: NOT USED — toolbar buttons are always visible on desktop; mobile uses wrapped row, not overlay
antiRepeatVerification.fullscreenOverlay: NOT USED — transitions use brief loading wave, not full-screen takes
antiRepeatVerification.cinematicFade: NOT USED — transitions are quick loading bars, not cinematic fades
